title: The 2026 Movie Star Rankings: 35 Under 35
format: Sean and Amanda's fifth 35-under-35 movie-star ranking: 17 new entrants, 11 aged out, and a countdown from Ayo Edebiri to Timothee Chalamet.

films.title: The Drama
films.note: Zendaya and Pattinson, sold on two faces alone: the proper test.

films.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
films.note: $372M worldwide; proof movies don't need stars.

films.title: Materialists
films.note: The same shape as The Drama and Challengers.

films.title: Marty Supreme
films.note: A star pushing a film to ~$200M almost by charismatic will.

films.title: The Bride
films.note: Jessie Buckley's swing that didn't open.

films.title: Dune: Part Three
films.note: The most anticipated, loaded with young stars.

films.title: The Odyssey
films.note: The one litmus test: did you get cast in it?
